chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. S- 150 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.03.2016 1. For Orders on MA 2289/16 2. For Orders on Office Objection 3. For Orders on MA 2290/16 4. For Hearing Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Abbasi, Advocate a/w Applicant 1. Urgency disposed of. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just legal objections. 4. The applicant by means of this application is seeking pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 20 of 2015 registered at police station Chotiyarioon under Section 302, 337-A(i), F(i), 504, 147, 148 and 149 PPC on the ground that he has been falsely implicated in this case, and against the deceased as many as 19 FIRs were registered. I have perused the FIR and other material available on record. The role assigned to the applicant is that he caused iron rod blow on the head of deceased with intention to commit his murder. The case against the applicant was investigated, and the challan has been submitted before the trial court showing him as absconder. I have asked the learned counsel as to why the applicant does not want to surrender before the trial court after seeking protection from this court for a certain period, he urges that since the applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case, this court can decide the application on merits having concurrent jurisdiction. Admittedly the applicant is shown absconder in the challan and a direct role of causing murder of deceased along with co-accused has been assigned to him in the FIR. No material indicating false implication of the applicant has been brought on record. In the facts and circumstances, no case for extra ordinary relief of pre-arrest bail is made out.

No material indicating false implication of the applicant has been brought on record. In the facts and circumstances, no case for extra ordinary relief of pre-arrest bail is made out. This bail application is therefore, dismissed along with pending applications. JUDGE Karar/-
